name: l2conceptv1
description: L2 Concept V1 - Vault + Ledger PDAs with MagicBlock Ephemeral Rollup

scripts.build:all: pnpm anchor:build && pnpm idl:sync && pnpm -r build
scripts.clean: find . -type d -name node_modules -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; find . -type d -name target -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; find . -type d -name dist -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; echo 'Cleaned build artifacts'
